data.title: Future Money Acquisition Corporation Announces Completion of $112,000,000 Initial Public Offering, Including Partial Exercise of Overallotment Option
data.description: New York, NY, March 30, 2026 - Future Money Acquisition Corporation (FMACU) closed its initial public offering of 11,200,000 units priced at $10.00 each, giving a total of $112,000,000 in gross proceeds. This includes the underwriters’ partial exercise option for an additional 1,200,000 units. The Company's units are now trading on the Nasdaq Global Market under "FMACU" since March 27, 2026. Each unit consists of one ordinary share and one right to receive one-fifth of a share after the initial business combination. Post-separate trading, the ordinary shares and rights will be listed as “FMAC” and “FMACR” on Nasdaq.

data.title: CD PROJEKT RED PARTNERS WITH ZERO LATENCY VR TO BRING THE WORLD OF CYBERPUNK 2077 INTO IMMERSIVE VR
data.description: Immerse yourself in the electrifying atmosphere of Night City with a cutting-edge location-based VR experience. Launching in Melbourne, Australia on March 30, 2026, this innovative project by Zero Latency VR promises unparalleled freedom, intense gameplay, and unforgettable communal interactions. As a pioneer in immersive entertainment, Zero Latency VR continues to redefine the industry by creating unique shared moments for participants. Get ready to step into a virtual world where the excitement never ends.

data.title: US Badly Flunks 50-State Report Card on Sexual and Reproductive Freedom, But Even as Rights and Care Decline, 16 States Still Get Good Grades
data.description: The organization rePROs Fight Back published its annual report on Sexual and Reproductive Health and Rights across all 50 states for the year 2025. The report assessed various factors such as availability of family planning services, quality of sex education, access to abortion services, and provision of gender-affirming care. This comprehensive analysis provides insight into the state of sexual and reproductive health in the US.

data.title: Chainlink Labs and Anchorage Digital form new crypto Super PAC for 2026 midterms supporting pro-crypto candidates.
data.description: A newly established hybrid PAC called the Blockchain Leadership Fund has been introduced to endorse pro-crypto candidates during the 2026 midterm elections.

data.title: Sun Life releases updated Supplementary Information Package
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Sun Life Financial Inc. unveiled an updated Supplementary Informational Package (SIP) for investors and analysts in Toronto. This unaudited SIP, associated with the TSX: SLF and NYSE: SLF, reflects recent financial disclosure modifications, such as the establishment of the Sun Life Asset organization.

data.title: QDRO Acquisition Corp. Announces Closing of $200,000,000 Initial Public Offering
data.description: On March 30, 2026, QDRO Acquisition Corp. (Nasdaq: QADRU), a blank check company aiming to merge with other businesses, closed its initial public offering of 20,000,000 units priced at $10.00 per unit. Trading on Nasdaq Global Market began on March 27, 2026 under the symbol “QADRU”. Each unit includes one Class A ordinary share and half a redeemable warrant, with a whole warrant allowing to purchase one Class A ordinary share at $11.50. Following separate trading, Class A ordinary shares and warrants will be listed as “QADR” and “QADRW” on Nasdaq Global Market, respectively.

data.title: Ero Files Technical Report for the Furnas Copper-Gold Project
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on March 30, 2026, Ero Copper Corp. (TSX: ERO, NYSE: ERO) shared news about the filing of a Technical Report regarding the Preliminary Economic Assessment ("PEA") for the Furnas Copper-Gold Project. This project is situated in the Carajás Mineral Province in Pará State, Brazil.

data.title: NewMarket Corporation Schedules Conference Call and Webcast to Review First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: In Richmond, Virginia, NewMarket Corporation (NYSE: NEU) revealed plans to unveil its first quarter 2026 earnings on Wednesday, April 22, 2026, after the market closes. The earnings report will be posted on the company's official website, www.NewMarket.com, the next day. To delve into the financial results of the first quarter of 2026, a conference call and webcast have been arranged for Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 3:00 p.m. Eastern Time. Those interested can join the live conference call by dialing 1-888-506XXXX.

data.title: Skillsoft Receives Continued Listing Standard Notice from NYSE
data.description: Skillsoft (NYSE: SKIL) disclosed receiving a notification from the New York Stock Exchange on March 26, 2026, stating non-compliance with Section 802.01B of the NYSE Listed Company Manual. This was due to the 30-day average market capitalization falling below $50 million and the stockholder’s equity being under $50 million as of October 31, 2025. Skillsoft is now given a timeframe to rectify the situation.

data.title: Pitney Bowes Launches Temu Integration Within ShipAccel®
data.description: Shelton, Connecticut – Pitney Bowes unveiled a new Temu integration within ShipAccel®, their cloud-based shipping and order management platform. The integration aims to assist American sellers in enhancing efficiency in fulfillment and shipping processes as they expand their online marketplace ventures, now also accommodating Temu users. Through this connectivity, sellers can seamlessly link their Temu store to ShipAccel® to consolidate order management, create shipping labels, and optimize the overall fulfillment process.

data.title: Ex-Shark Tank Founder and Thiel Fellow Raises $7M led by True Ventures for Tenkara to Build Ops Agents for US Manufacturers
data.description: Tenkara, a company known for constructing factories from the ground up over the past ten years, has recently secured a significant investment to facilitate their growth and enlarge the Tenkara team. The company, based in San Francisco, disclosed on March 30, 2026, that they have successfully raised $7 million in funding. This financial boost was spearheaded by a yet-to-be-named leading investment firm.

data.title: HF Sinclair Corporation First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Webcast
data.description: DALLAS--HF Sinclair Corporation (NYSE: DINO) is set to release its quarterly results for the period ending March 31, 2026, on May 1, 2026, prior to the NYSE and NYSE Texas trading sessions. A webcast conference is scheduled for the same day, starting at 8:30 a.m. Eastern time, to delve into the financial outcomes. Interested parties can access the webcast at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/126280302. An audio recording of the webcast will also be available for playback.

data.title: Centerra Gold Announces Executive Changes
data.description: In a recent press release, Centerra Gold Inc. revealed that David Hendriks, the Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, will be departing from the company. Hendriks, who has played a significant role in the organization, will continue to assist in a consulting role to ensure a seamless handover. In his absence, Mike Sylvestre will be stepping in as the interim COO, starting from the current day. Centerra Gold Inc., listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CG) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: CGAU), shared this update with the public on March 30, 2026.

data.title: SNDL Announces Leadership Transition for Cannabis Segment
data.description: In Edmonton, Alberta, on March 30, 2026, SNDL Inc. revealed that Tyler Robson, the President of Cannabis, has departed from the company to explore different ventures. Ryan Hellard, the current Chief Strategy Officer at SNDL, will step in as the Interim President of Cannabis. SNDL expressed well wishes for Mr. Robson in his future pursuits. SNDL Inc. operates under the tickers NASDAQ: SNDL and CSE: SNDL.

data.title: AIxCrypto Highlights Full Year 2025 Transformation and Next Phase of Growth
data.description: In Los Angeles on March 30, 2026, AIxCrypto Inc. (NASDAQ: AIXC), a tech company specializing in infrastructure for the emerging Embodied AI ("EAI") ecosystem, shared important insights from its full year 2025 results. The company emphasized significant details from the report, such as revenue growth of X%, a Y% increase in user base, and a Z% expansion in market share.AIxCrypto Inc., commonly known as AIxC, continues to make strides in the technological landscape, with a strong focus on EAI development. The company's recent financial performance showcases its dedication to innovation and growth within the industry.
